---
title: "Release Gate Stack"
---

# Release Gate Stack

**Working seal:** `stack://release-gate-stack/B694241159`

**Enter:** Use when a change set is already built and the question is whether it is ready to ship.

| Step | Spell               | Artifact                                                     | Advance when                                      |
| ---- | ------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------ | ------------------------------------------------- |
| 1    | Assemble candidate  | Frozen release artifact and config                           | Candidate is exact                                |
| 2    | Quality gate        | Tests, static checks, scans, and prerequisites               | Quality gate is green                             |
| 3    | Stage deploy        | Staging or canary deployment                                 | Limited environment is live                       |
| 4    | Observe             | Metrics, logs, traces, dashboards, and critical-flow results | Signals remain green                              |
| 5    | Promote or rollback | Release decision                                             | Broad release happens only if guard remains green |

## On Fail

Rollback the candidate and open a repair stack instead of arguing from hope.

## Why It Works

It resists shipping by narrative alone.
